hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】如果市场剧烈下滑，新的 ETF 策略可能会很脆弱。这就是为什么；【FINANCE】美国银行首席执行官布赖恩·莫伊尼汉表示消费银行业务“健康”，高于预期；【FINANCE】尽管伊朗战争，中国机器人出租车公司仍继续在阿联酋扩张。

items.title: If a violent downturn strikes the market, new ETF strategies may be vulnerable. Here's why
items.summary: Innovation in the exchange-traded fund industry could come at a cost to investors during extreme volatility.
items.title_zh: 如果市场剧烈下滑，新的 ETF 策略可能会很脆弱。这就是为什么
items.summary_zh: 在极端波动期间，交易所交易基金行业的创新可能会让投资者付出代价。

items.title: Bank of America tops estimates as CEO Brian Moynihan says consumer banking is 'healthy'
items.summary: Bank of America, the second-largest U.S. bank by assets, has topped expectations for earnings per share for 23 consecutive quarters.
items.title_zh: 美国银行首席执行官布赖恩·莫伊尼汉表示消费银行业务“健康”，高于预期
items.summary_zh: 美国银行是美国资产第二大银行，其每股收益连续 23 个季度超出预期。

items.title: Chinese robotaxi companies forge ahead with UAE expansion despite Iran war
items.summary: Ride-hailing company Didi plans to begin its first overseas robotaxi test in the United Arab Emirates later this year.
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗战争，中国机器人出租车公司仍继续在阿联酋扩张
items.summary_zh: 网约车公司滴滴计划今年晚些时候在阿拉伯联合酋长国开始其首次海外机器人出租车测试。

items.title: In Qatar, Trapped Between the U.S. and Iran, War Forced a Reckoning
items.summary: The gas-rich Gulf nation is in a state of “strategic shock” after the war dealt a serious blow to its economy, sending ripples around the world.
items.title_zh: 在卡塔尔，夹在美国和伊朗之间，战争迫使人们进行清算
items.summary_zh: 这个天然气资源丰富的海湾国家在战争对其经济造成严重打击并在世界各地引发涟漪后正处于“战略冲击”状态。

items.title: 'DeFi is dead': crypto community scrambles after this year's biggest hack exposes contagion risks
items.summary: Developers and traders warn of structural risks as a cross-chain exploit spreads fear and prompts billions to flee DeFi platforms.
items.title_zh: “DeFi 已死”：今年最大的黑客攻击暴露了传染风险，加密货币社区陷入混乱
items.summary_zh: 开发人员和交易员警告结构性风险，因为跨链漏洞会传播恐惧并促使数十亿人逃离 DeFi 平台。

items.title: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
items.summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.
items.title_zh: 引入 GPT-Rosalind 用于生命科学研究
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了 GPT-Rosalind，这是一种前沿推理模型，旨在加速药物发现、基因组分析、蛋白质推理和科学研究工作流程。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Attacks Iranian Cargo Ship While Preparing for New Round of Talks
items.summary: President Trump said a Navy destroyer had attacked and seized an Iranian-flagged vessel in the Gulf of Oman. The White House said it is dispatching a high-level delegation, including Vice President JD Vance, to Pakistan for negotiations.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国在准备新一轮会谈时袭击伊朗货船
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，一艘海军驱逐舰在阿曼湾袭击并扣押了一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的船只。白宫表示，将派遣包括副总统万斯在内的高级代表团前往巴基斯坦进行谈判。

items.title: Codex for (almost) everything
items.summary: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
items.title_zh: （几乎）所有内容的法典
items.summary_zh: 适用于 macOS 和 Windows 的更新后的 Codex 应用程序增加了计算机使用、应用程序内浏览、图像生成、内存和插件，以加速开发人员工作流程。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: Software stock dogs have joined market rally. There's a classic investing lesson in the rebound
items.summary: In a 2026 market that had Microsoft down close to 20%, looking for opportunities to buy after big drawdowns is coming to more tech and software stocks.
items.title_zh: 软件股也加入了市场上涨行列。反弹中有一个经典的投资教训
items.summary_zh: 在 2026 年的市场中，微软股价下跌了近 20%，更多科技和软件股票在大幅下跌后寻找买入机会。

items.title: Retail traders pile into Allbirds after odd AI pivot. History shows it won't end well
items.summary: This surge of speculative buying reflects a broader return of animal spirits among small traders.
items.title_zh: 在奇怪的人工智能转向之后，零售交易员纷纷涌入 Allbirds。历史表明它不会有好结局
items.summary_zh: 投机性买盘的激增反映出小贸易商的动物精神更广泛地回归。

items.title: Eight children killed in Louisiana shooting, police say
items.summary: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting that police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".
items.title_zh: 警方称路易斯安那州枪击事件中八名儿童丧生
items.summary_zh: 这些儿童年龄从 1 岁到 14 岁不等，他们在一次枪击事件中丧生，警方称此次枪击事件为“家庭骚乱”。

items.title: Rat poison found in HiPP baby food jar in Austria, police say
items.summary: The brand warned on Saturday that consuming the purées may be potentially "life-threatening".
items.title_zh: 奥地利警方称在 HiPP 喜宝婴儿食品罐中发现老鼠药
items.summary_zh: 该品牌周六警告称，食用果泥可能会“危及生命”。

items.title: Zelensky condemns US extension of Russian sanctions waiver
items.summary: The US argues that the waiver is meant to ease the energy supply crunch sparked by the US-Israel war with Iran.
items.title_zh: 泽连斯基谴责美国延长俄罗斯制裁豁免
items.summary_zh: 美国认为，豁免旨在缓解美以与伊朗战争引发的能源供应紧缩。

items.title: U.S. Officials Visited Havana to Lay Out Proposals for Cuban Reforms
items.summary: The delegation told Cuba’s leadership that it had only a narrow window of time to make the economic and political changes demanded by the Trump administration.
items.title_zh: 美国官员访问哈瓦那提出古巴改革建议
items.summary_zh: 代表团告诉古巴领导层，实现特朗普政府要求的经济和政治变革的时间很短。

items.title: Hack at Vercel sends crypto developers scrambling to lock down API keys
items.summary: Breach tied to compromised AI tool may have exposed credentials used by app frontends, the user-facing layer that connects web3 wallets and trading interfaces to backend services.
items.title_zh: Vercel 遭黑客攻击导致加密货币开发人员争先恐后地锁定 API 密钥
items.summary_zh: 与受感染的 AI 工具相关的违规行为可能会暴露应用程序前端使用的凭据，该前端是将 web3 钱包和交易接口连接到后端服务的面向用户的层。

items.title: The $292 million Kelp exploit: how it happened, and what it means for DeFi
items.summary: 2026 is shaping up to be DeFi's "worst year in terms of hacks," Ledger's CTO said, as the Kelp exploit shows how a single point of failure can cascade across systems.
items.title_zh: 价值 2.92 亿美元的 Kelp 漏洞：它是如何发生的，以及它对 DeFi 意味着什么
items.summary_zh: Ledger 的首席技术官表示，2026 年将成为 DeFi“遭受黑客攻击最严重的一年”，因为 Kelp 漏洞表明单点故障可以跨系统级联。

items.title: Aave sees $6 billion deposit drop as Kelp hack exposes structural risk for DeFi lender
items.summary: The AAVE token fell 16% and deposits fled the protocol after attackers used drained rsETH as collateral to borrow wrapped ether, leaving Aave to quantify how much bad debt it is now carrying.
items.title_zh: 由于 Kelp 黑客攻击暴露了 DeFi 贷方的结构性风险，Aave 预计存款下降 60 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 在攻击者使用耗尽的 rsETH 作为抵押品借入打包的以太币后，AAVE 代币下跌了 16%，存款逃离了协议，使得 Aave 无法量化它现在背负了多少坏账。

items.title: Web3 hosting backbone Vercel confirms breach as supposed hacker demands $2 million ransom
items.summary: Many crypto and Web3 projects deploy frontends on Vercel, raising the risk that secrets stored as non-sensitive environment variables may now be exposed.
items.title_zh: Web3 托管主干 Vercel 确认违规，疑似黑客索要 200 万美元赎金
items.summary_zh: 许多加密和 Web3 项目在 Vercel 上部署前端，这增加了存储为非敏感环境变量的秘密可能被暴露的风险。

items.title: Strategy looks to boost preferred stock STRC’s dividend payments to semi-monthly
items.summary: STRC is a perpetual preferred stock designed to trade near a $100 par value that currently pays a dividend at an annualized rate of 11.5%.
items.title_zh: 策略旨在将优先股 STRC 的股息支付提高至半月一次
items.summary_zh: STRC 是一种永久优先股，设计交易面值接近 100 美元，目前以年化 11.5% 的利率支付股息。

items.title: Rhea Finance post-mortem puts exploit losses at $18.4 million, more than double initial estimates
items.summary: Using what the team described as a "deliberately constructed swap route," the attacker opened a large number of margin trading positions.
items.title_zh: Rhea Finance 事后分析表明，漏洞利用造成的损失为 1,840 万美元，是最初估计的两倍多
items.summary_zh: 利用该团队所描述的“故意构建的互换路线”，攻击者开设了大量保证金交易头寸。

items.title: Trending Crypto: RaveDAO (RAVE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #227.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：RaveDAO (RAVE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 227 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #56.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Aave (AAVE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 56。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #879.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：wojak (WOJAK)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#879。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Asteroid Shiba (ASTEROID)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #235.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：小行星芝（ASTEROID）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 235 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #108.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 108。

items.title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
items.summary: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.
items.title_zh: Agents SDK 的下一步发展
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过本机沙箱执行和模型本机工具更新了 Agents SDK，帮助开发人员跨文件和工具构建安全、长期运行的代理。

items.title: Creating images with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to create and refine images with ChatGPT using clear prompts, iterate on designs, and generate high-quality visuals in minutes.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 创建图像
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 使用清晰的提示创建和优化图像、迭代设计并在几分钟内生成高质量的视觉效果。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.
items.title_zh: 为世界各地的生物学家带来人工智能驱动的蛋白质设计工具
items.summary_zh: OpenProtein.AI 由 Tristan Bepler 博士 '20 和前麻省理工学院教授 Tim Lu 博士 '07 创立，为研究人员提供开源模型和其他蛋白质工程工具。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Iran Eases Some Internet Restrictions, as Wider Blackout Passes 50th Day
items.summary: Critics say Iran may be creating a “tiered internet” model, where access is limited to the politically and economically privileged.
items.title_zh: 大范围停电已过第 50 天，伊朗放松了一些互联网限制
items.summary_zh: 批评人士称，伊朗可能正在创建一种“分层互联网”模式，其中的访问权限仅限于政治和经济上享有特权的人。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 03/31/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Tuesday, 03/31/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Selling Volatility: The Most Seductive Backtest in Finance [Quantt] Here is a strategy with a thirty-year track record. Se
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日星期二 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！卖出波动性：金融领域最诱人的回测 [Quantt] 这是一个拥有三十年记录的策略。硒

items.title: Singapore-based Cobo launches agentic wallet with guardrails for AI-led onchain execution
items.summary: Cobo has launched Cobo Agentic Wallet, enabling AI agents to perform onchain tasks and incorporating multi-party computation for safety.
items.title_zh: 总部位于新加坡的 Cobo 推出带有护栏的代理钱包，用于人工智能主导的链上执行
items.summary_zh: Cobo推出了Cobo Agentic Wallet，使AI代理能够执行链上任务，并结合多方计算以确保安全。

items.title: Alcoa nears deal to sell dormant New York smelter site to Bitcoin miner NYDIG: Bloomberg
items.summary: Oplinger said the transaction should close in the middle part of this year, as the aluminum giant works to offload 10 dormant US smelter sites.
items.title_zh: 美国铝业公司即将达成协议，将休眠的纽约冶炼厂出售给比特币矿商 NYDIG：彭博社
items.summary_zh: Oplinger 表示，该交易应该会在今年中期完成，因为这家铝业巨头正在努力出售 10 个休眠的美国冶炼厂。

items.title: Judge says Caitlyn Jenner’s JENNER memecoin is not a security in class action lawsuit
items.summary: A judge ruled that a memecoin launched by media personality Caitlyn Jenner is not a security despite claims in a class action lawsuit.
items.title_zh: 法官称凯特琳·詹纳 (Caitlyn Jenner) 的詹纳模因币不是集体诉讼中的证券
items.summary_zh: 尽管在集体诉讼中提出索赔，但法官仍裁定媒体名人凯特琳·詹纳 (Caitlyn Jenner) 推出的模因币不是证券。

items.title: ChatGPT for research
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for research to gather sources, analyze information, and create structured, citation-backed insights.
items.title_zh: 用于研究的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行研究，以收集资源、分析信息并创建结构化的、有引文支持的见解。

items.title: Building a Fast Multilingual OCR Model with Synthetic Data
items.title_zh: 使用合成数据构建快速多语言 OCR 模型

items.title: Training and Finetuning Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 使用句子变压器训练和微调多模态嵌入和重排序模型

items.title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 带有句子变压器的多模态嵌入和重新排序模型

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web
items.title_zh: 通过 Chrome 中的 AI 模式探索网络的新方式
items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in March 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from March 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 3 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: AI startup Cursor in talks to raise $2 billion funding round at valuation of over $50 billion
items.summary: Artificial intelligence startup Cursor in talks to raise a $2 billion fundraising round at an over $50 billion valuation, which does not include the investment.
items.title_zh: AI初创公司Cursor正在洽谈融资20亿美元，估值超过500亿美元
items.summary_zh: 人工智能初创公司 Cursor 正在洽谈一轮 20 亿美元融资，估值超过 500 亿美元，其中不包括投资。

items.title: Here are 3 forces that drove a remarkable, record-setting week on Wall Street
items.summary: The S&P 500 closed above 7,100 for the first time as it completed its fastest turnaround since 1990.
items.title_zh: 以下三股力量推动了华尔街创下非凡创纪录的一周
items.summary_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数首次收于 7,100 点之上，完成了 1990 年以来最快的反转。

items.title: Goldman Sachs bond traders stumbled as Wall Street rivals thrived: 'A fire is being lit under' them
items.summary: Goldman's identity as a trader's firm — one expected to perform in turbulent markets — makes any stumble in the division notable.
items.title_zh: 高盛债券交易员跌跌撞撞，而华尔街竞争对手却蓬勃发展：“他们的底下正在点燃一把火”
items.summary_zh: 高盛作为交易商公司的身份——预计将在动荡的市场中表现出色——使得该部门的任何失误都引人注目。

items.title: Regulators are reportedly zeroing in on suspicious trades ahead of market-moving Trump post
items.summary: The information sought includes so-called Tag 50 identifiers, which can be used to determine who was behind the trades.
items.title_zh: 据报道，在特朗普发表影响市场的言论之前，监管机构正在重点关注可疑交易
items.summary_zh: 寻求的信息包括所谓的 Tag 50 标识符，可用于确定交易背后的人员。

items.title: Morgan Stanley tops estimates as trading revenue exceeds expectations by nearly $1 billion
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's results in the quarter were powered by the firm's fixed income and equities trading operations, which produced about $8.5 billion in revenue.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利交易收入超预期近 10 亿美元，超出预期
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利本季度的业绩得益于该公司的固定收益和股票交易业务，产生了约 85 亿美元的收入。

items.title: US intercepts and seizes Iranian-flagged cargo ship, Trump says
items.summary: Tehran vows retaliation soon for what it calls an "act of armed piracy", which comes as the US prepares for a second round of talks.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国拦截并扣押了悬挂伊朗国旗的货船
items.summary_zh: 德黑兰誓言很快将对所谓的“武装海盗行为”进行报复，这一行为发生在美国准备第二轮会谈之际。

items.title: Tehran will never cede control of Strait of Hormuz, senior Iranian politician tells BBC
items.summary: Lyse Doucet speaks to Ebrahim Azizi, who says Iran "will decide the right of passage" through the crucial shipping route.
items.title_zh: 伊朗高级政治家告诉 BBC，德黑兰永远不会放弃对霍尔木兹海峡的控制
items.summary_zh: 莱瑟·杜塞特 (Lyse Doucet) 与易卜拉欣·阿齐兹 (Ebrahim Azizi) 交谈，阿齐兹表示，伊朗“将决定”这条重要航线的通行权。

items.title: Ukraine police chief resigns after officers allegedly fled deadly shooting
items.summary: Authorities say the officers have been suspended and an investigation into their actions is under way.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰警察局长因涉嫌逃离致命枪击事件而辞职
items.summary_zh: 当局表示，这些警员已被停职，并对他们的行为进行调查。

items.title: Rumen Radev looks set to win Bulgarian Parliamentary election
items.summary: Exit polls put his Progressive Bulgaria on 37%, more than double the score of the closest runner-up, but he will likely need to form a coalition to govern.
items.title_zh: 鲁门·拉德夫 (Rumen Radev) 有望赢得保加利亚议会选举
items.summary_zh: 出口民意调查显示，他的进步保加利亚支持率为 37%，是最接近的亚军得分的两倍多，但他可能需要组建一个联盟来执政。

items.title: Thousands of Parisians evacuated as WW2 bomb detonated
items.summary: Residents within a 450m radius of the device were told to leave their homes while it was neutralised.
items.title_zh: 二战炸弹爆炸 数千巴黎人撤离
items.summary_zh: 该装置周围 450m 半径范围内的居民被告知在该装置失效期间离开家。

items.title: Ontario Premier Doug Ford agrees to sell $21m private jet following outcry
items.summary: After confirming the purchase on Friday, Ford drew critcism from political opponents who called it a "gravy plane" and "out of touch".
items.title_zh: 安大略省省长道格·福特在强烈抗议后同意出售价值 2100 万美元的私人飞机
items.summary_zh: 福特在周五确认购买后，遭到了政治对手的批评，称其为“肉汁飞机”和“脱节”。

items.title: Pope says 'tyrants' speech was not aimed at Trump
items.summary: The pontiff says his remarks have been misinterpreted after a spat with the US president.
items.title_zh: 教皇称“暴君”演讲并非针对特朗普
items.summary_zh: 教皇表示，在与美国总统发生口角后，他的言论被误解了。

items.title: Hamas Officials Say Group Is Ready to Hand Over Some Weapons
items.summary: Two senior Hamas officials in Gaza said the group was prepared to relinquish some automatic rifles and other arms, a concession that falls short of Israeli-U.S. demands.
items.title_zh: 哈马斯官员称该组织已准备好交出部分武器
items.summary_zh: 加沙的两名哈马斯高级官员表示，该组织准备放弃一些自动步枪和其他武器，这一让步没有达到以色列和美国的要求。需求。

items.title: Gen Z Looks to Nepal as a Test Case of Its Hopes
items.summary: Many youth-led protests around the world have failed to bring meaningful change. But in Nepal, a new government is promising to do things differently.
items.title_zh: Z 世代将尼泊尔视为其希望的考验
items.summary_zh: 世界各地许多年轻人领导的抗议活动未能带来有意义的改变。但在尼泊尔，新政府承诺采取不同的做法。

items.title: British Counterterrorism Police Investigating Attacks Against Jewish Sites
items.summary: The police say they are focusing on a shadowy Islamic group that may have links to Iran and which has claimed responsibility for several recent arson attacks.
items.title_zh: 英国反恐警察调查针对犹太场所的袭击
items.summary_zh: 警方表示，他们正在关注一个可能与伊朗有联系的神秘伊斯兰组织，该组织声称对最近的几起纵火袭击事件负责。

items.title: Fire Destroys Most of Coastal Village in Malaysia
items.summary: A community of stilt homes on the island of Borneo was reduced to ash in an overnight blaze.
items.title_zh: 马来西亚沿海村庄大部分被大火烧毁
items.summary_zh: 婆罗洲岛上的一个高脚屋社区在一夜间大火中化为灰烬。

items.title: Bulgarian Voters Back New Political Coalition Led by Radev
items.summary: With its citizens yearning for the kind of prosperous life enjoyed by other Europeans, Bulgaria held its eighth election in five years.
items.title_zh: 保加利亚选民支持拉德夫领导的新政治联盟
items.summary_zh: 由于其公民渴望其他欧洲人享有的繁荣生活，保加利亚举行了五年内的第八次选举。

items.title: How Gen Z Protests Have Fared Around the World
items.summary: Over the past year or so, young people have rallied across continents to oust old-guard governments. What’s happened since?
items.title_zh: Z世代抗议活动在世界各地的进展如何
items.summary_zh: 在过去一年左右的时间里，年轻人在各大洲联合起来推翻守旧的政府。从那以后发生了什么？

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 03/29/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Sunday, 03/29/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Brave New Backtest [Robot Wealth] My last two articles on AI and trading research got more engagement than almost anything

items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 3 月 29 日星期日 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！勇敢的新回测 [机器人财富] 我最近两篇关于人工智能和交易研究的文章几乎比任何其他文章都受到了更多的关注

items.title: Previewing Consensus' Policy Summit: State of Crypto
items.summary: Every year policy discussions get more important, and this year's even more so.
items.title_zh: 预览共识政策峰会：加密货币现状
items.summary_zh: 政策讨论每年都变得更加重要，今年更是如此。

items.title: Web3 VCs have a differentiation problem
items.summary: When every fund claims the same great networks and strong relationships, nobody wins. Bauer, Co-Founder of TBV, offers a more rigorous framework for emerging managers to build a unique value proposition.
items.title_zh: Web3 VC 存在差异化问题
items.summary_zh: 当每支基金都声称拥有同样强大的网络和牢固的关系时，没有人会获胜。 TBV 联合创始人 Bauer 为新兴管理者提供了更严格的框架，以构建独特的价值主张。

items.title: Stablecoins can help businesses turn costs into revenue, Paxos Labs cofounder says
items.summary: Firms using stablecoins can reshape margins by cutting costs, unlock credit and earn yield, but not every company needs to issue a token, Paxos Labs' Chunda McCain said.
items.title_zh: Paxos Labs 联合创始人表示，稳定币可以帮助企业将成本转化为收入
items.summary_zh: Paxos Labs 的 Chunda McCain 表示，使用稳定币的公司可以通过削减成本、释放信贷和赚取收益来重塑利润，但并不是每家公司都需要发行代币。

items.title: RaveDAO's RAVE token collapses 90% in a day as exchange probes widen
items.summary: The token traded at $1.15 on Sunday, down from a $27.33 peak on Friday, wiping out more than $5 billion in market cap as investigations into Binance and Bitget advance.
items.title_zh: 随着交易所调查范围扩大，RaveDAO 的 RAVE 代币一天内暴跌 90%
items.summary_zh: 随着对 B​​inance 和 Bitget 的调查的推进，该代币周日的交易价格为 1.15 美元，低于周五 27.33 美元的峰值，市值蒸发了超过 50 亿美元。

items.title: Inside the rise of wrench attacks against crypto holders and how France has become the focus
items.summary: France has seen 41 crypto-related kidnappings this year, roughly one every 2.5 days, prompting authorities to step up security.
items.title_zh: 针对加密货币持有者的扳手攻击的兴起以及法国如何成为焦点
items.summary_zh: 法国今年发生了 41 起与加密货币相关的绑架事件，大约每 2.5 天就发生一起，促使当局加强安全措施。

items.title: Nomura study says 65% of institutional investors see crypto as a vital portfolio diversifier
items.summary: A new survey from Nomura and Laser Digital shows improving sentiment among institutional investors, as regulatory clarity and new products drive deeper engagement with digital assets.
items.title_zh: 野村证券研究表明，65% 的机构投资者将加密货币视为重要的投资组合多元化工具
items.summary_zh: 野村证券和 Laser Digital 的一项新调查显示，随着监管的明确性和新产品推动人们更深入地参与数字资产，机构投资者的情绪正在改善。

items.title: EasyDNS accepts responsibility for eth.limo hijack, its first social engineering breach in 28 years
items.summary: The incident joins a growing list of crypto front-ends compromised at the DNS layer in recent months, where even decentralized protocols are vulnerable.
items.title_zh: EasyDNS 承认对 eth.limo 劫持事件负责，这是 28 年来的首次社会工程违规事件
items.summary_zh: 近几个月来，越来越多的加密前端在 DNS 层受到损害，甚至去中心化协议也容易受到攻击。

items.title: RaveDAO team denies role in RAVE token pump as Binance, Bitget open investigations
items.summary: Onchain investigator ZachXBT alleged a pump-and-dump scheme and has offered a $25,000 bounty for whistleblowers.
items.title_zh: 随着 Binance、Bitget 展开调查，RaveDAO 团队否认在 RAVE 代币泵中发挥作用
items.summary_zh: 链上调查员 ZachXBT 指控存在拉高抛售计划，并为举报者悬赏 25,000 美元。

items.title: Kelp DAO’s rsETH bridge apparently exploited for roughly $292 million in LayerZero-based attack
items.summary: Kelp's emergency pauser multisig froze the protocol's core contracts roughly 46 minutes after the successful drain, blocking two follow-up attempts.
items.title_zh: Kelp DAO 的 rsETH 桥显然在基于 LayerZero 的攻击中被利用，损失了约 2.92 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Kelp 的紧急暂停器多重签名在成功耗尽后大约 46 分钟冻结了协议的核心合约，阻止了两次后续尝试。

items.title: Crypto Council for Innovation gains Digital Energy Council as its first energy-focused acquisition
items.summary: CCI is adding the Digital Energy Council to its roster, marking the first member dedicated specifically to digital energy policy.
items.title_zh: 加密货币创新委员会收购数字能源委员会，这是其首次以能源为重点的收购
items.summary_zh: CCI 将数字能源委员会纳入其名册，这是第一个专门致力于数字能源政策的成员。

items.title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
items.summary: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.
items.title_zh: 加速保护我们所有人的网络防御生态系统
items.summary_zh: 领先的安全公司和企业加入 OpenAI 的网络可信访问，利用 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​ 和 1000 万美元的 API 拨款来加强全球网络防御。

items.title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
items.summary: OpenAI expands its Trusted Access for Cyber program, introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders and strengthening safeguards as AI cybersecurity capabilities advance.
items.title_zh: 下一个网络防御时代的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展了其可信网络访问计划，向经过审查的防御者引入 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​，并随着 AI 网络安全能力的进步而加强保障措施。

items.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
items.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.
items.title_zh: 企业通过 OpenAI 为 Cloudflare Agent Cloud 中的代理工作流程提供支持
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 将 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 引入 Agent Cloud，使企业能够快速、安全地构建、部署和扩展用于实际任务的 AI 代理。

items.title: Healthcare
items.summary: Explore how clinicians use ChatGPT to support diagnosis, documentation, and patient care with secure, HIPAA-compliant AI tools.
items.title_zh: 卫生保健
items.summary_zh: 探索临床医生如何使用 ChatGPT 通过安全、符合 HIPAA 的 AI 工具来支持诊断、记录和患者护理。

items.title: Our response to the Axios developer tool compromise
items.summary: OpenAI responds to the Axios supply chain attack by rotating macOS code signing certificates, updating apps, and confirming no user data was compromised.
items.title_zh: 我们对 Axios 开发者工具妥协的回应
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过轮换 macOS 代码签名证书、更新应用程序并确认没有用户数据受到损害来响应 Axios 供应链攻击。

items.title: Ecom-RLVE: Adaptive Verifiable Environments for E-Commerce Conversational Agents
items.title_zh: Ecom-RLVE：电子商务会话代理的自适应可验证环境

items.title: The PR you would have opened yourself
items.title_zh: 你自己开的 PR

items.title: Inside VAKRA: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Failure Modes of Agents
items.title_zh: VAKRA 内部：代理的推理、工具使用和故障模式

items.title: Meet HoloTab by HCompany. Your AI browser companion.
items.title_zh: 了解 HCompany 的 HoloTab。您的人工智能浏览器伴侣。

items.title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
items.title_zh: Waypoint-1.5：适用于日常 GPU 的更高保真度交互世界

items.title: Safetensors is Joining the PyTorch Foundation
items.title_zh: Safetensors 即将加入 PyTorch 基金会

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
items.summary: The latest tools from Google can help you plan trips, find a great deal and explore your next destination.
items.title_zh: 在 Google 的帮助下，今年夏天智能出行的 7 种方式
items.summary_zh: Google 的最新工具可以帮助您计划旅行、找到超值优惠并探索下一个目的地。

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS：下一代富有表现力的人工智能语音
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.summary: Skills in Chrome let you discover, save and remix AI workflows — and repeat them instantly.
items.title_zh: 将您最好的 AI 提示变成 Chrome 中的一键式工具
items.summary_zh: Chrome 中的技能可让您发现、保存和重新混合 AI 工作流程 - 并立即重复它们。

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Google is bringing people together in Washington D.C. at our AI for the Economy Forum.
items.title_zh: 人工智能经济论坛将人们聚集在一起
items.summary_zh: 谷歌将人们聚集在华盛顿特区，参加我们的人工智能经济论坛。

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI
items.summary: As the School of Humanities, Arts, and Social Sciences marks 75 years, Dean Agustín Rayo reflects on how AI is reshaping higher education and why SHASS disciplines continue to be central to MIT’s mission.
items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
items.summary_zh: 在人文、艺术和社会科学学院成立 75 周年之际，院长 Agustín Rayo 反思了人工智能如何重塑高等教育，以及为什么 SHASS 学科仍然是麻省理工学院使命的核心。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。
